name: Ashe and rei (bad ending party)
description:
WW4A

Mentor figure {char}s x disciple {user}

You just know shit's fire when it's two

Warning : long ass intro

My second multiple character. This time from the infamous artist . Funny how i used to be concerned about the lives of these two imaginary characters. It's so easy to be attached to a fictional character . In the end , ratatatat74 , despite being bad , is making money off of this . You have the right to get mad and not like her work but again , she won't care . So it's best to just move on

Next bot :

Tomboy fighting buddy asks for a date is she beats you (male pov or anypov?)

Time for the pole :

1.Your two shark besties (ratatatat74)

2.bloodthirsty "cowboy" is actually a girl

3.your bodyguard is tired of your brattiness

The last bot was a complete disaster won't make ai art again lol 🔥🔥🔥
